creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Alastair,

I stumbled here coming from bug #270714.

In fact, you can't update this port like that.  Source is GitHub, and the precise commit to use is specified in the GH_TAGNAME variable, which you didn't change.  You can see that the hash and size also didn't change in the 'distfiles' file.

I had a look to Neel's repository and there is indeed no more recent commit to change GH_TAGNAME to.  So someone will have to go through importing diffs from upstream in Neel's repository first (personally, I have no time to do this).

Thanks and regards.
